behavior_summary: Orchestrates a summoned-daemon / ritual encounter anchored to an input Item/NPC reference (param1). The main routine finds a valid spawn location near the referenced item, spawns a hostile NPC and temporary item/effects, runs a timed audiovisual sequence (SFX, playSFX, FIRESPEL effects), directs the spawned NPC toward the item, and then performs cleanup (destroy temporary items, reset references).
Protects the Avatar/player during critical sequences by setting and later clearing Avatar stasis when invoked in a special context (this == 0x01).

Provides helper utilities: a wait/monitor that resumes on map change and handles post-spawn behavior (U8P_DAEMSPEL::func08BF), a ritual/dialogue/consequence flow with player-facing barks and pass/fail handling (U8P_DAEMSPEL::func0AD8), and a reusable timed audiovisual/effect driver used by sequences (U8P_DAEMSPEL::func122E).

Uses iterative spawn-location search logic around the item (direction via Item::getDirToItem, iterative offsets, canExistAt checks) until a valid placement is found, with special-case proximity/lock handling.
Coordinates external engine utilities for SFX/effects, NPC creation, temporary item creation/pop, timing (FREE::*), and status-flag toggles (METHOD::toggleStatusFlag) as part of the scripted event.
notable_control_flow: Main loop in U8P_DAEMSPEL::func0080: read param1 coordinates, compute direction offsets (local7/local5/local6), iterate (local4) adjusting offsets and testing canExistAt until local8 becomes true (valid spawn location).

Suspend/wait points used to synchronize with player or engine events: special-case entry when this == 0x01 captures a suspend result (local3) and may set avatar stasis; many METHOD and FREE calls are followed by suspend to time animations/effects.

U8P_DAEMSPEL::func08BF monitors map changes (records Npc::getMap(this) at entry), suspends, and then resumes only when the stored map differs — used to avoid continuing across map transitions. It also branches heavily on distance and isDead checks to either run an item-specific effect sequence or reassign targets.

U8P_DAEMSPEL::func0AD8 uses Item::isNpc / Item::getType to choose between a simple audio response or a full NPC-directed cinematic sequence (clear combat, METHOD animations, FIRESPEL effects, FREE timers, toggle status, destroy).

U8P_DAEMSPEL::func122E runs repeated METHOD::func15E7 calls separated by suspends with randomized Item::create/Item::pop and FIRESPEL effects to produce repeated audiovisual impacts; it also respects avatar stasis when invoked in the special context.
open_questions: Exact numeric meanings for many magic constants (e.g., item type 0x60, offset constants like 0x60/0x08) and how they map to in-game entity types or visual offsets remain inferred.

Whether U8P_DAEMSPEL::func0080 directly invokes U8P_DAEMSPEL::func0AD8 or U8P_DAEMSPEL::func122E in every branch is not always explicit in the decompilation (some helper usages are inferred from shared calls and similar sequencing).

Precise semantics and parameter layout of canExistAt and METHOD::func15E7 (which flags/arguments are passed) are not recovered and therefore the exact placement and movement instructions are approximated.
Any global flags that might be set/read elsewhere to gate this encounter are not present in this script dump — whether external global state interacts with the flow is unknown.

main_function.name: U8P_DAEMSPEL::func0080
main_function.purpose: Handle the lifecycle of a summoned daemon/ritual encounter: accept an item/NPC reference, optionally protect the Avatar with stasis, compute and validate a spawn position around the reference, create a hostile NPC and associated temporary items/effects, sequence SFX/animations and NPC actions toward the item, then restore Avatar state and clean up.
entry_conditions: Called with an Item/NPC reference parameter (param1) — primary trigger.
Special-case behavior when invoked with this == 0x01 (inferred engine/actor context) that waits on a suspend result and may set Avatar stasis.
Iterative spawn-location search that loops until a valid canExistAt(...) result is found or a proximity/lock branch triggers.

function_map.role: monitor/wait helper that resumes on map change and handles post-spawn or item-specific sequences

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMSPEL::func0AD8
function_map.role: ritual/dialogue/consequence flow: barks, suspend-derived choices, and NPC-directed cinematic sequence

function_map.name: U8P_DAEMSPEL::func122E
function_map.role: reusable timed audiovisual/effect sequence (SFX, item pops, METHOD movement steps)

Reuse the common timing/effect sequence for parts of the ritual/NPC cinematic

external_calls.purpose: Play the main fire-spell SFX tied to the ritual/spawn
Pre-sequence camera/animation setup step called before suspends
Drive NPC/item movement/action steps (direction + flags) toward the item or during the cinematic

Read input item Y coordinate as basis for spawn/effect placement
Read input item Z coordinate as basis for spawn/effect placement

Spawn the hostile NPC instance at an approved location

Remove NPC from combat state before running scripted animations/movements

Pick randomized X/Y offsets around the reference item for varied effect placement

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Orchestrates a summoned-daemon / ritual encounter anchored to an input Item/NPC reference (param1). The main routine finds a valid spawn location near the referenced item, spawns a hostile NPC and temporary item/effects, runs a timed audiovisual sequence (SFX, playSFX, FIRESPEL effects), directs the spawned NPC toward the item, and then performs cleanup (destroy temporary items, reset references).
